name: langfuse
description: Langfuse observability - query traces, debug exceptions, analyze sessions, manage prompts via MCP tools

interface.shortDescription: Query traces, debug exceptions, analyze sessions, and manage prompts via MCP
interface.longDescription: Inspect Langfuse traces, observations, sessions, exceptions, prompts, and datasets from Codex via bundled skills and MCP workflows.
defaultPrompt: Investigate the latest Langfuse exceptions and tell me which service is failing first.
Summarize the slowest traces from the last 24 hours and suggest where to look next.
Create a dataset item from this failing trace and label the related prompt for follow-up.
